subcodes.first_line: O people of God and His servants! The Day of God that hath been recorded in all the heavenly Books by the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله و عباده یوم الهی که در جمیع کتب سماوی از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @martyrs and martyrdom
